prerequisites.value: Con 13, Skyseeker Style, Skyseeker Thrash, Step Up, base attack bonus +9.

description.value: **Benefit:** While using Skyseeker Style, whenever you hit an opponent larger than you with a melee attack, your weapon deals damage as if that weapon were one size category larger. You also gain a +4 bonus on sunder combat maneuver checks against targets larger than you.
